form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (23.31) over 400m at Geelong. Nicely drawn on the inside but will need everything to go her way.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 1.3 lengths at Warrnambool over 390m (22.73) beating Mana's Way in Grade 5 on March 30. Makes appeal on the back of that latest win.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 390m at this track behind Frequency beaten 3.5 lengths (22.68). Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (23.08) in a Grade 5, finishing a 9 length sixth. Has two wins and two placings from eight starts from the draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.
